hello: greeting expression used when meeting someone
world: the planet Earth and all its inhabitants
help: assistance or support provided to someone
example: a thing characteristic of its kind or illustrating a general rule
language: a system of communication consisting of sounds, words, and grammar
book: a set of printed pages bound together forming a volume
tree: a woody plant with a distinct trunk and branches
water: a transparent liquid essential for life
science: the intellectual and practical activity encompassing the systematic study
music: vocal or instrumental sounds combined to produce beauty of form
